finding: official_tennis_control (zero-shot) ball_track.json predictions match CVAT ground-truth box centers to within ~0.003-0.006px on 26/40 clips (65%, 1787/2388 rows, 74.8% of the new corpus) -- not achievable by genuine independent zero-shot model inference. Isolating these clips shows pooled F1 = 0.710 (contaminated) vs 0.236 (clean 14-clip subset) vs 0.5956 (all 40 blended) vs 0.3611 historical reference (old 20-clip/1121-row corpus).
hypothesis_not_confirmed_root_cause: Most likely mechanism: CVAT semi-automatic review anchoring -- these clips labels may have been pre-filled from a models own high-confidence detections (plausibly WASB zero-shot itself, or a closely-correlated candidate) and accepted with minimal human correction on easy/confident frames, while genuinely-wrong frames were corrected (explains why some _L0HVmAlCQI clips like rally_0011/0012 show real disagreement, F1=0.615, while most others are exactly 1.0). Not confirmed against CVAT provenance metadata (out of this lanes read access/scope) -- flagged for the manager/owner to investigate labeling-tool provenance for job_21 and the ballingest2 18-clip batch.
